attacking_style: Launches long-range solo attacks from breakaways (35km out observed twice), particularly on technical descents and inside final 10km. Also times late tactical accelerations inside 8km to disrupt chase dynamics.
team_tactics: Minimal team support visible; operates primarily from early breakaways where he initiates moves then attacks companions. Self-sufficient racer who positions aggressively in early breaks (observed in Flanders, Tour de Suisse, Tour de Pologne).
terrain_preference: Excels in short power ITTs (9-17km), technical descents where cornering skills shine, and uphill time trials. Exposed on sustained climbs and hilly stage circuits where pure climbing power required.
vulnerability: Cracks immediately on early climb accelerations when outmatched by pure climbers. Poor breakaway energy allocation leads to capture despite hour-long efforts. Overcommits in wet technical conditions risking crashes.
key_patterns: Dominates short power ITTs under 20km, beating world-class opposition by 7-8 seconds consistently
Attacks solo from breakaways at extreme distances (35km+), holding minute gaps temporarily
Technical descent specialist: won stage attacking on descent through corners, utilizes cornering skills
European Champion baseline established 2023 but showing form inconsistency on home roads
Breaks immediately when pure climbers accelerate on sustained gradients, lacks climbing reserves
form_trajectory: negative: 2023 shows disappointing performances on home roads (Tour de Suisse) despite European Champion status, suggesting form deficit or adaptation issues compared to strong 2021-2022 ITT victories
built_from: 2021 Ronde van Vlaanderen - Tour des Flandres
2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 10
